scripts.build: pnpm run build:ts && pnpm run native:build
scripts.build:ts: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm --filter @aegis/api build && pnpm --filter @aegis/admin-demo build
scripts.test: pnpm run test:ts && pnpm run native:test:optional
scripts.native:test: cargo test --manifest-path native/Cargo.toml -p payload_normalizer -p request_inspector -p risk_scoring_core -p security_parser
scripts.prisma:generate: cross-env DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:postgres@localhost:5432/aegis pnpm --filter @aegis/api exec prisma generate --schema prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.check:security: pnpm run audit:deps && cargo audit --manifest-path native/Cargo.toml || exit 0
scripts.postinstall: pnpm run prisma:generate && pnpm run native:build:optional
